entries: Left must be smaller than right

{"provider":"tencent-cloud","targetLanguage":"zh-CN","sourceLanguage":null,"text":"NewSource returns a new pseudo-random [Source] seeded with the given value.
Unlike the default [Source] used by top-level functions, this source is not
safe for concurrent use by multiple goroutines.
The returned [Source] implements [Source64]."}

NewSource返回用给定值种子的新伪随机[Source]。
与顶级函数使用的默认[Source]不同，此源不是
可供多个goroutine同时使用。
返回的[Source]实现[Source 64]。

{"provider":"tencent-cloud","targetLanguage":"zh-CN","sourceLanguage":null,"text":"UnixNano returns t as a Unix time, the number of nanoseconds elapsed
since January 1, 1970 UTC. The result is undefined if the Unix time
in nanoseconds cannot be represented by an int64 (a date before the year
1678 or after 2262). Note that this means the result of calling UnixNano
on the zero Time is undefined. The result does not depend on the
location associated with t."}

UnixNano返回t作为Unix时间，即经过的微秒数
自1970年1月1日协调时起。如果是Unix时间，则结果未定义
单位为微秒不能用int 64（年前的日期）表示
1678年或2262年之后）。请注意，这意味着调用UnixNano的结果
在零时时间未定义。结果不取决于
与t相关的位置。
